meta.title: Salem Rizk | Social Media Manager & Performance Marketer
meta.description: Premium social media management, Meta Ads, graphic design, video editing, and website development. Based in Edko, Beheira, Egypt.

hero.sub: I help businesses grow through professional social media management, creative content, high-performance Meta Ads campaigns, and data-driven marketing optimization.

about.title: Turning Digital Presence Into
about.p1: I'm Salem Rizk — a performance-focused Social Media Manager, Meta Ads specialist, and Creative Designer based in Edko, Beheira, Egypt. I don't just manage pages; I architect complete digital marketing systems that deliver measurable business results.
about.p2: With 3+ years of hands-on experience across diverse industries — from automotive lubricants to fashion retail and education — I've developed a deep understanding of what moves people to act. Every campaign I run is designed with one goal in mind:
about.p3: Currently working as a freelancer managing multiple projects simultaneously — page management, content design, ad campaigns, and web development. I believe real work in this field is measured by results, not just aesthetics.
about.p4: My goal is to keep growing in digital marketing and development to deliver stronger and more professional services in the future.

items.title: VAKO Damanhour
items.subtitle: Transforming a Local Store into a Successful Digital Brand
items.description: I started working with VAKO some time ago, where I created a Google Maps store location and developed a professional website for the store. When I took over the page, it had only 180 followers with limited reach (400-300). In a short period, I worked on developing content and implementing an integrated marketing strategy, which led to growing followers to 1,900 and achieving a total reach of 2.5 million. I executed advertising campaigns that achieved the best results at the lowest possible cost, and we started achieving organic reach of 60,000 to 70,000 per post. As a result of these efforts, messages and customers began flowing in significantly through digital marketing.

results.subtitle: Numbers don't lie. Here's what I've delivered across all client campaigns combined.
results.context2: in the automotive, fashion, and education industries — proving that the right strategy works across any sector.

aboutPage.title: About Salem Rezk
aboutPage.heading: The Beginning, Evolution, and Ongoing Journey.
aboutPage.bio1: Born in Beheira Governorate, Salem Rezk initially pursued a passion for football, playing for several sports clubs until 2020. This year marked a turning point in his career as he stopped playing football to focus on completing his academic studies.
aboutPage.bio2: In early 2020, he entered the tech industry and strongly began his journey in content creation, producing over 600 videos and summaries, which helped hone his creative skills.
aboutPage.bio3: During his studies, he served as the Administrative Manager at Al-Hilal Alexandrian Club for a season and a half. He was entirely responsible for marketing, club systems, and coordinating all internal administrative affairs. Simultaneously, he worked as a freelancer.
aboutPage.bio4: He later took over the marketing management for a major educational center in Alexandria (TTC), and subsequently added the management of ESCO Motor Oils to his portfolio, achieving exceptional success with both.
aboutPage.bio5: Since graduating and up to the present day, Salem continues to fully manage the marketing operations for both TTC and ESCO. Concurrently, he maintains his freelance work in web development, social media management, and graphic design, providing comprehensive solutions for major companies and projects.
